Quest: Grangpa Figure_Six

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Excuse me...

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
First time?
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] Probably asking if it is my first time here.\c[0])

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Yes.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
I can tell just by looking at you.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
So, how long have you been living in this town?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Umm...Since my birth.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Really! A local.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Can’t say I see a local very often.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
But I think you will fit right in.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
You have the perfect body for that.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
And with proper training, you could one day become one of my top girls.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Umm...What are you talking about?

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
And dumb too.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Perfect. You have all the qualities of a good whore.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
What!? No! I'm not a whore.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Well, not yet of course. But you will become one once you start working for me.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
I have no interest in working for you!

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Then what are you doing in a brothel?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Er...I’m looking for a girl.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Really! forgive me for thinking that you are just another girl who came here to earn some easy money.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Well then, tell me what kind of girl you are into?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Actually, this is not for me. She is for someone else.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Oh, so you are into that.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Into what?

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
You know, into watching while your boyfriend fucks the whore in front of you.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
No, it’s nothing like that. And it's not for my boyfriend.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
It’s for someone else. I'm just doing him a favor.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Well then, bring that "someone" here, and he can choose for himself.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Yeah, that’s the thing. He can't come here. He is very old.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
So I was hoping I could hire one of your girls and take her to him.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
You mean home service?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Yeah, something like that.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Sorry, we don’t do home service.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Please, can't you make an exception just for me?

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
I’m afraid not. Company policy.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Well, I guess I should be going then.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Wait up.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Yes?

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
I probably shouldn't tell you this because it will only hurt my own business, but in your case, I'll make an exception.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Because I think you have great potential to be a whore.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Maybe if I help you today, one day you'll reconsider becoming a whore in my establishment.
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] Not a chance!\c[0])

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
So anyway, there are some freelance prostitutes who work outside, on the street.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Some of them even provide home service as well.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Thanks for your information.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
No problem. I hope I'll see you soon.
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] I don’t think so.\c[0])
Quest: A Whore's Dilemma

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Hey, nice to see you again.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
I guess since you are here again, you change your mind?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
About what?

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
You know, about working for me?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
No, I did not.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Then do you want to hire one of my girls?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Umm, no. Actually, T-Dog sent me.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
T-Dog? Don’t tell me you work for him?!

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Yeah, I am.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
You chose that asshole over me. I am really hurt!

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
It has nothing to do with you!

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Besides, it’s better than working as a prostitute.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
I won’t be so sure about that.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
You have chosen a very dangerous path.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
You were better off as a prostitute.
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] Did I really make a wrong decision by working for Mr. victor?!\c[0])
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] Well, I can’t turn back now after coming this far.\c[0])

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Look, I am not here for chitchat. I heard there is some problem with one of your girls.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Yeah. She is one of the girls I hired very recently.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Go talk to her for details. Her room is upstairs.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Room No: 203.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Alright then.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
So, have to talk to her?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Yes, I did. Apparently, there was a misunderstanding between her and one of the clients.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Yeah right!
(\c[23]She said sarcastically.\c[0])

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
There wasn't any misunderstanding.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
She couldn't do one job I hired her to do.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Unless she fixes that attitude of hers, I will have no choice but to fire her.
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] Yeah, tell me about it.\c[0])

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
But for now, you can take care of that problem for her.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Yeah, about that. I don't see why it's that big of a problem.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
It’s just one disgruntled customer. I am sure your brothel will survive without him.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
It’s not just that. This establishment's reputation is at stake.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
What do you think people will think if they find out whores of this brothel don't even suck their clients.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Yeah, but why would anyone believe him.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Not like he is someone important or something.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Oh, but he is. He is the leader of the labor union.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
And many of our clients are from the union.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
So now do you see the problem?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Yeah. I think so.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
So anyway, where can I find that client of hers?

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
I think he lives on the \c[6]Second floor\c[0] of an old \c[13]Rundown Building\c[0] in the Slum.
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] I think it's the same building where \c[6]T-Dog\c[23] lives.\c[0])

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
And what is his name?

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Name huh? Let's see...I think his name is Davin or Darek.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
But you will recognise him once you see him.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
He is a fat ugly looking guy with terrible personal hygiene.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Umm, Thanks.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
I will take care of him.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
You better. Or it's her ass on the line.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
I can't have a whore who won't fuck her customers.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
I will try my best. See you later.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
So you are back! Any news?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Yeah, I solved the problem for you.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
He won’t make any complaint against you or your brothel.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
That’s nice to hear.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
But it wasn’t that big of a problem anyway.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
I could’ve dealt with it myself.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
All I had to do is fire that girl.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
This is what that man wanted anyway.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Only reason I didn’t do that is that T-Dog asked me not to.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
He helps me out occasionally, and he was the one who recommended that girl.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
But I run a brothel here.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
If she can’t act like a whore she won’t have a place in here for much longer.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Sooner or later I have to fire her.
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] That won’t do. Not after everything I have been through for her.\c[0])

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Can’t you teach her, you know...how to...

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
How to be a whore?

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Of course I can. And I already tried.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
But she has to drop that attitude of hers.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Please, give her another chance, for my sake.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
For your sake, huh? Well, I guess I could give her another shot.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
She does have a nice body. She can become a very good whore if she puts her mind to it.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
But would you do something for me in return?
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] Haven’t I done enough for that girl already!\c[0])

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Umm...What...what do you want from me?
(\c[23]She asked very timidly.\c[0])

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Hah hah. Don’t look so scared.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
I just want to invite you to my home.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Why?
(\c[23]She said, looking surprised.\c[0])

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Well, you see, I took a liking to you.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
So I wanna get to know you more, that’s all.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Well, I guess I could come to your home.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Where do you live?

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
I live in the \c[13]Apartment Building\c[0] near the \c[27]Brothel\c[0].

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
You should easily find it in your \c[6]Map\c[0].

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
And my apartment number is \c[14]1-1\c[0].

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
You can come to my home anytime before evening.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
I am usually at home at that time.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Ok, then. I will see you soon.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Can’t wait.
Quest: Gangster Apprentice_Day three

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Jane! How nice of you to visit me!

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Actually I’m here for another reason.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Oh! And here I thought it’s just a friendly visit.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
I guess you don’t think of me as your friend.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Of course I do. I’m sorry if I disappointed you.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Oh you are too easy!

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Relax. I’m just teasing you.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Oh! You got me.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
So tell me, what do you need this time?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
I wanted to know if any of your clients are cops?

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Of course. All sorts of people come here.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
And cops are one of my top clients.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Is a cop named Johnson one of them?

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Yep. He is one of my regulars.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Way? Are you interested in him?

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
He is married though. Not that it matters, ha ha.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
No! I’m not interested in him. Well, not in that way.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
I am just looking for some information.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
T-Dog gave you another job, didn’t he?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Yeah.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
I don’t know why you are still working for him. That man is nothing but bad news.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
I have my reasons.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Maybe you can tell me about it.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Or are we not close enough for that?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
We are. And I would love to talk to you about my life.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Then why don’t you come over to my place tomorrow? There you can tell me all about it.
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] I really like her. Maybe I should take up on her offer.\c[0])

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Umm, yeah, sure.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Great. It’s a date.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Now then, what do you wanna know about him?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
You know, some personal information.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Like, if he has any problem at work, or going through any other bad situation, things like that.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
If you are thinking about blackmailing him, I will advise against it.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
It’s not a good idea to blackmail a cop.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Don’t worry, I’m not gonna blackmail him. It's not my style.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
I need to convince him of something, and more information means I will have more options to negotiate.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
If that’s the case, I can help you with that.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Thank you.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Now then, the cop you are talking about, I think he has a favorite whore.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Everytime he comes here, he usually hires her.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Hmm...let’s see...I think her name is Maria.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
Let me check if she is free right now.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Sure, take your time.
\>She used an intercom to talk to her.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
looks like you are in luck. She is not with any client right now.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
If you want, you can talk to her now.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Thanks, I will do that.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
You can find her upstairs, in room \c[14]202\c[0].

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Thanks for your help.

\c[2]Madame:\c[0]
No problem. And don’t forget about our date.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
I won’t. See you.
Quest: Bartender

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Hey Charlotte, how is it going?

\c[2]Charlotte:\c[0]
Jane! What a pleasant surprise!

\c[2]Charlotte:\c[0]
I thought you forgot about me.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Of course not.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
I was just too busy to see you.

\c[2]Charlotte:\c[0]
Is that so?

\c[2]Charlotte:\c[0]
Well then, What brought you here today?

\c[2]Charlotte:\c[0]
Did you finally change your mind about working here?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Well, kinda.

\c[2]Charlotte:\c[0]
Great! I am so happy to hear it.

\c[2]Charlotte:\c[0]
Having someone as pretty as you will definitely increase our number of clients.

\c[2]Charlotte:\c[0]
You are gonna be very busy from now on.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Hold on a second!

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
I am here for the bartender job.

\c[2]Charlotte:\c[0]
The bartender job?

\c[2]Charlotte:\c[0]
How do you know about that?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Mr. Victor told me.

\c[2]Charlotte:\c[0]
Oh, right. I forgot you work for him.

\c[2]Charlotte:\c[0]
Even though I warned you about it.

\c[2]Charlotte:\c[0]
It would have been better if you just became a prostitute.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
You really don’t like him, do you?

\c[2]Charlotte:\c[0]
It’s not like that.

\c[2]Charlotte:\c[0]
Mr. Victor is my sponsor. I have nothing against him.

\c[2]Charlotte:\c[0]
Without his help, I wouldn’t be able to run my business.

\c[2]Charlotte:\c[0]
But that doesn’t change the fact that he is dangerous.

\c[2]Charlotte:\c[0]
And I don’t want my friend to put her life at risk by working for him.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Thanks for your concern. I really appreciate it.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
But I have to do it. You know why, right?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
I already told you about that.

\c[2]Charlotte:\c[0]
Yeah, I know. It’s for the sake of your revenge.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Not just for revenge. For the sake of justice as well.

\c[2]Charlotte:\c[0]
Well, if this is how you feel, I won’t say anything else.

\c[2]Charlotte:\c[0]
And if you want that bartender job, it’s all yours.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
